# CodeCraft UI

CodeCraft UI is a production-focused frontend website and component system for React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

Canonical site: https://codecraft-ui.vercel.app

Important routes:
- /: Overview of the CodeCraft UI redesign and migration offering.
- /components: Free UI component library with category browsing, variant previews, fullscreen viewing, highlighted code, and copy-ready snippets.
- /hero: Focused hero-section examples preserved from the original component catalogue.
- /about: Company story, values, and migration timeline.
- /pricing: Project scope shapes and discussion notes without fixed public pricing.
- /cta: Conversion CTA patterns and examples.
- /faqs: Questions about the migration, architecture, SEO, and contact flow.
- /contact: Contact form and direct email/social links.

Primary contact:
- Email: chandrasekharbangam@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/chandraSekharBangam
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chandra-sekhar-b-62a0a7316

Technology stack:
- Next.js App Router
- React
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Metadata routes
- JSON-LD structured data
